instruction: Seattle still needs a decision because the review email note, the forecast, and today's America/Los_Angeles calendar don't line up cleanly. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the daily check schedule in place, and either put the review on the calendar or send ops@example.com the async update.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the latest review note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and Seattle should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Seattle contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-11
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-21 --cron '0 18 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Seattle daily contradiction check'

email send --to ops@example.com --subject 'Seattle async update' --body 'I checked the latest review note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and Seattle should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.'
